content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/review.py", "summary": "This file contains an asynchronous function that acts as a review gate in the story generation pipeline. It checks if the review mode is enabled and either passes the generated stories directly to approved_stories or sets the status to 'reviewing' for human intervention.", "rules": [{"name": "Review Node Processing", "description": "Determines whether generated stories should be reviewed by a human before being approved.", "conditions": ["state['review_mode'] is False"], "actions": ["Return state with 'approved_stories' set to 'generated_stories', 'human_approved' set to True, and status set to 'creating'"]}, {"name": "Review Mode Active", "description": "When review mode is enabled, the function sets the status of the story generation process to 'reviewing'.", "conditions": ["state['review_mode'] is True"], "actions": ["Return state with status set to 'reviewing'"]}], "dependencies": ["pipeline.state.StoryForgeState"]}
